Petition Of Co-Trustee Lorraine E. Bongiovanni For Final Distribution Of Trust Assets, Including Trust Share Of Beneficiary Stephen A. Lubey To Pooled Special Needs Trust; Account Of Trust Reserve And Beneficiary Share
Off Calendar Dec-24-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Suzanne McDonnell for and with Lorraine Bongiovanni (Petitioner).

Ms. McDonnell stated that she did not hear from Mr. Freedman, that she spoke with Ms. Cohen and she will not be attending, and that there are no objections to the accounting. The Court granted the Amended Petition of Co-Trustee Lorraine Bongiovanni for Final Distribution of Trust Assets, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

Petition Of Co-Trustee Lorraine E. Bongiovanni For Instructions Re: Approval To Settle A Claim Against Trust
Off Calendar Dec-20-2016 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Instructions 1. For Suspension Of Powers And Removal Of Lorraine Ellen Bongiovanni, Craig Edward Lubey Co-Trustees And Appointment Of...
Off Calendar Sep-06-2016 Continued To Dec-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for and with (petitioner) Janice Lubey. Suzanne McDonnell for and with (co-trustees) Lorraine Bongiovanni & Craig Lubey.

The Court stated that this is a petition to remove and suspend trustees, that there is an alleged failure to account and asked if everyone has talked with each other. Mr. Freedman stated that he just spoke with his client, that they are amenable to mediation, that there is a failure of holding property for over 8 years, that is client is a 1/10th beneficiary and would like to see this be done. Ms. McDonnell stated that she agrees, that the parties have not talked and that the trust has $466,000.00 in assets with $51,000.00 set aside for a disabled beneficiary. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than December 9, 2016. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by December 14, 2016. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on December 20, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions 1. For Suspension Of Powers And Removal Of Lorraine Ellen Bongiovanni, Craig Edward Lubey Co-Trustees And Appointment Of...
Off Calendar Jul-26-2016 Continued To Sep-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions 1. For Suspension Of Powers And Removal Of Lorraine Ellen Bongiovanni, Craig Edward Lubey Co-Trustees And Appointment Of...

Petition For Instructions 1. For Suspension Of Powers And Removal Of Lorraine Ellen Bongiovanni, Craig Edward Lubey Co-Trustees And Appointment Of...
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Continued To Jul-19-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for and with petitioner Janice Lubey; Suzanne McDonnell for co-trustees Craig Lubey and Lorraine Bongiovanni.

Ms. McDonnell stated that the co-trustees had filed their accounting on May 26 and served it to petitioner, and that the parties agreed the matter should be continued. Mr. Freedman said that there was agreement on the need to continue the hearing. He stated that he was in the process of reviewing the accounting, and that there were questions regarding it which the parties needed to discuss. Upon agreement of counsel, the matter was continued to July 19, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy John Boncato. (Not reported)
